column.name: RFGSK
column.description: Total reference status of all items

column.name: LFGSK
column.description: Overall delivery status for all items

column.name: ABSTK
column.description: Overall rejection status of all document items

column.name: LVSTK
column.description: Overall status of warehouse management activities

column.name: UVALS
column.description: Total incompletion status of all items in general

column.name: UVVLS
column.description: Total incompletion status of all items: Delivery

column.name: UVFAS
column.description: Total incompletion status of all items: Billing

column.name: UVALL
column.description: General incompletion status of the header

column.name: UVFAK
column.description: Header incompletion status with respect to billing

column.name: UVPRS
column.description: Document is incomplete with respect to pricing

column.name: FKIVK
column.description: Billing totals status for intercompany billing

column.name: RELIK
column.description: Invoice list status of billing document

column.name: UVS01
column.description: Customer reserves 1: Sum of all items

column.name: UVS02
column.description: Customer reserves 2: Sum of all items

column.name: UVS03
column.description: Customer reserves 3: Sum of all items

column.name: UVS04
column.description: Customer reserves 4: Sum of all items

column.name: UVS05
column.description: Customer reserves 5: Sum of all items

column.name: PKSTK
column.description: Overall packing status of all items

column.name: CMPSA
column.description: Status of static credit limit check

column.name: CMPSB
column.description: Status of dynamic credit limit check in the credit horizon

column.name: CMPSC
column.description: Status of credit check against maximum document value

column.name: CMPSD
column.description: Status of credit check against terms of payment

column.name: CMPSE
column.description: Status of credit check against customer review date

column.name: CMPSF
column.description: Status of credit check against open items due

column.name: CMPSG
column.description: Status of credit check against oldest open items

column.name: CMPSH
column.description: Status of credit check against highest dunning level

column.name: CMPSI
column.description: Status of credit check against financial document

column.name: CMPSJ
column.description: Status of credit check against export credit insurance

column.name: CMPSK
column.description: Status of credit check against payment card authorization

column.name: CMPSL
column.description: Status of credit check of reserves 4

column.name: CMPS0
column.description: Status of credit check for customer reserve 1

column.name: CMPS1
column.description: Status of credit check for customer reserve 2

column.name: CMPS2
column.description: Status of credit check for customer reserve 3

column.name: UVPAS
column.description: Totals incomplete status for all items: packaging

column.name: UVPIS
column.description: Totals incomplete status for all items: Picking

column.name: UVWAS
column.description: Total incomplete status of all items: post goods movement

column.name: UVWAK
column.description: Post header incomplete status for goods movement

column.name: HDALL
column.description: Inbound delivery header not yet complete (on Hold)

column.name: HDALS
column.description: At least one of ID items not yet complete (on Hold)

column.name: CMPS_CM
column.description: Status of Credit Check SAP Credit Management

column.name: CMPS_TE
column.description: Status of Technical Error SAP Credit Management
